context_values.response.implement:
Implemented the approved milestone-1 Hermes bootstrap slice in [adapter.py](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM8B4Y4NNZWZRDSHM5TGK1E3/worktree/services/hermes-adapter/adapter.py#L57), [__init__.py](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM8B4Y4NNZWZRDSHM5TGK1E3/worktree/services/hermes-adapter/__init__.py#L1), and [bootstrap_hermes.sh](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM8B4Y4NNZWZRDSHM5TGK1E3/worktree/scripts/bootstrap_hermes.sh#L1). The adapter now validates delegated authority tokens, persists connection state, enforces `observe` and `summarize` boundaries, and keeps direct control outside this slice. I also restored the reviewed Hermes source artifacts and wrote the implementation-stage docs in [implementation.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM8B4Y4NNZWZRDSHM5TGK1E3/worktree/outputs/hermes-adapter/implementation.md#L1), [verification.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM8B4Y4NNZWZRDSHM5TGK1E3/worktree/outputs/hermes-adapter/verification.md#L1), [quality.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM8B4Y4NNZWZRDSHM5TGK1E3/worktree/outputs/hermes-adapter/quality.md#L1), and [integration.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM8B4Y4NNZWZRDSHM5TGK1E3/worktree/outputs/hermes-adapter/integration.md#L1).

Verification passed with `./scripts/bootstrap_hermes.sh` on initial run and rerun, including malformed-token rejection, expired-token rejection, disconnected-read rejection, observe-only read success, summarize-only append success, and idempotent bootstrap. The generated quality gate is green in [quality.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM8B4Y4NNZWZRDSHM5TGK1E3/worktree/outputs/hermes-adapter/quality.md#L1). `promotion.md` was intentionally left untouched because that artifact is owned by the review stage.
